caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, conical wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses, facing slightly toward the left of the frame. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears as a watermark on the left and right sides of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, subtly shifting his facial expression and moving his lips as if speaking, while the overall setting and his clothing remain constant.
